data.title: Sprint orchestrator does not invoke /dso:end after completing a long working session
data.description: After completing an epic (all stories closed, epic closed, merged to main), the sprint orchestrator exits without running /dso:end. This means technical learnings, session summary, and worktree cleanup steps from /dso:end are skipped silently. Observed after baff-7163 (DSO NextJS Starter) completed — sprint exited directly without end-session steps.
